subject: docs(all): create all documentation files from CLAUDE.md spec
body:
Populates the docs/ directory with all files defined in the
documentation section of CLAUDE.md: SESSION_NOTES, TODO, HISTORY,
USER_ACTIONS, AI_MISTAKES, USER_GUIDE, and TESTING_GUIDE. Each
file is seeded with accurate content reflecting the current state
of the project.

Tags: documentation
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: developer-experience
Semver: patch

https://claude.ai/code/session_01FdaHNSoiK2aamrRW8MMh72
